use_cases: Landing page hero section background animation to capture attention
Decorative loading state visual indicator for async operations
Section divider or background accent for product showcases
Visual interest element for feature presentations
Ambient animation for marketing and portfolio sites
ai_summary: Animated decorative component featuring nested squares with gradient borders that continuously scale and rotate in a mesmerizing bloom-like pattern. Commonly used as loading indicators, hero section backgrounds, or visual accents to add motion and color to interfaces.
